title: Bee Removal in Mott Haven, Bronx | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Mott Haven, Bronx. Safe, humane extraction by licensed experts. Serving residential & commercial properties. Call now for fast service!
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in Mott Haven? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe and effective bee removal services throughout this vibrant South Bronx neighborhood. Our licensed technicians handle everything from swarms in residential buildings to hives in commercial properties, ensuring complete removal with pricing between $350-$550 depending on hive location and size.
whyUs: As Mott Haven's trusted pest control experts, we combine years of local experience with humane bee removal techniques that protect both your property and the environment. Our team responds quickly to service calls throughout the neighborhood, from the historic row houses near St. Mary's Park to the modern developments along the waterfront.
localContext: Mott Haven's mix of pre-war walkups, newer waterfront buildings, and community gardens creates diverse opportunities for bee colonies to establish themselves. The neighborhood's proximity to green spaces like St. Mary's Park and the Harlem River waterfront means bees often seek shelter in building facades, rooftop areas, and ventilation systems common in both older and newer Bronx construction.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee removal call in Mott Haven?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Mott Haven bee removal requests within 24 hours, often same-day for emergency situations. Our team is familiar with the neighborhood's layout and can quickly reach properties throughout the area, from East 138th Street down to the waterfront.

faqs.question: What determines the cost of bee removal in Mott Haven?
faqs.answer: Bee removal costs between $350-$550 depending on factors like hive location, accessibility, colony size, and building type. Higher or hard-to-reach locations such as rooftops on multi-story buildings or within wall cavities may be at the higher end of the price range.

faqs.question: Do you remove bees humanely?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize humane bee removal whenever possible. Our technicians safely relocate colonies rather than exterminating them, working with local beekeepers to preserve these important pollinators while ensuring your Mott Haven property is bee-free.

faqs.question: Can bees return after removal?
faqs.answer: We take preventative measures to ensure bees don't return to the same location. After removal, we clean the area of honeycomb and pheromones, seal entry points, and provide recommendations to make your Mott Haven property less attractive to future swarms.
